name: Lemon Cherry Gelato
description_sm: Tingly and relaxed effects with sweet, sour, and fruity flavours.
description_md: Lemon Cherry Gelato offers a soothing, relaxed experience with an uplifting and giggly mood, complemented by its sweet citrus and fruity aromas.
description_lg: Lemon Cherry Gelato is a popular hybrid strain with a relaxing and euphoric high that eases anxiety, pain, and stress. Its flavour profile features sweet lemon, berries, and tropical fruit with earthy and pine undertones. Buds are dense forest green with amber hairs and crystalline trichomes, providing a pleasurable experience from uplifted moods to full-body relaxation.

name: Blue Dream
description_sm: Sweet berry flavours and a euphoric, creative head high.
description_md: Blue Dream delivers an uplifting cerebral high paired with mellow body relaxation, featuring sweet blueberry and vanilla flavours that linger delightfully.
description_lg: Blue Dream, a renowned hybrid from California, offers an immediate uplifting cerebral high that fuels creativity and motivation, balanced by a soothing body relaxation. Its aroma combines sweet blueberry pie with vanilla, and the flavour maintains a sugary sweetness. The dense, bright green nugs with blue hues are coated in a fine layer of white trichomes, providing a rich sensory experience suitable for relieving stress and pain.

name: Wedding Cake
description_sm: Sweet, creamy flavour with relaxing, euphoric and happy effects.
description_md: Wedding Cake offers a rich, tangy flavour with peppery and vanilla notes, providing a relaxing and euphoric high ideal for calming the mind and body.
description_lg: Wedding Cake, also known as Triangle Mints #23 and Pink Cookies, is celebrated for its potent relaxing effects that soothe the body and mind. This strain features dense, frosty buds with dark green leaves and vibrant orange hairs. Its flavour is a delightful blend of sweet, creamy cherry pie with spicy, peppery undertones and vanilla notes. Hailed as Leafly's Strain of the Year in 2019, Wedding Cake is prized by medical users for relief from chronic pain, insomnia, and appetite loss.

name: Permanent Marker
description_sm: Sweet candy and citrus flavours match a relaxed, creative and euphoric high.
description_md: Permanent Marker offers a strong, lingering flavour of soapy funk with candy and floral gas notes, supporting creativity and relaxation day or night.
description_lg: Permanent Marker is a modern award-winning strain known for its pungent aroma reminiscent of a permanent marker with floral, soapy, candy, and gassy tones. Its dense bright emerald-green and purple buds with orange hairs are visually striking. The high brings a balanced blend of lifted creativity and calming relaxation, perfect for unwinding or artistic pursuits. Noted for its sweet and sour fruity candy flavour with citrusy diesel aroma, it is also celebrated for supporting relief from conditions like chronic fatigue, mood swings, and stress.

name: GG4
description_sm: Pungent diesel and chocolate notes complement deeply relaxing and euphoric effects.
description_md: Known as Original Glue, this potent strain delivers heavy euphoria and body relaxation with earthy, sour, and woody aromas, ideal for restful evenings.
description_lg: Original Glue, also known as GG4, is a multiple award-winning strain prized for its chunky, resin-covered buds and pungent earthy, sour aromas inherited from its parent strains. The high begins with uplifting euphoria, quickly ushering in deep body relaxation that leaves you feeling glued to the couch. Its rich chemical diesel flavour with chocolate undertones complements a heavy-hitting sedative effect, often chosen for alleviating chronic pain, insomnia, and muscle spasms. The dense olive green popcorn-shaped nugs feature amber hairs and frosty crystal trichomes.

name: Super Boof
description_sm: Sweet berry and cherry flavours blend with uplifting and relaxed feelings.
description_md: Super Boof boasts juicy sweet cherry and berry flavours with nutty, sour citrus aromas, delivering a giggly, creative and relaxing high.
description_lg: Super Boof, also called Blockberry, is an evenly balanced hybrid cherished for its chunky, deep green and purple-dappled buds with silver calyxes. Its sweet and fruity cherry berry flavours and nutty, sour citrus aroma set the scene for effects that bring both cerebral stimulation and physical relaxation. The high instils creative focus, uplifting energy, followed by a relaxed, giggly haze. Highly regarded among connoisseurs, it has won multiple top honours in flower and hash categories and is known to support conditions such as chronic pain, stress, fibromyalgia, and gastrointestinal issues.

name: Granddaddy Purple
description_sm: Berry-sweet flavour meets a relaxing and euphoric cerebral buzz.
description_md: Granddaddy Purple offers a dreamy cerebral euphoria and deep relaxation, perfect for easing pain, stress, and insomnia while boasting rich berry and grape flavours.
description_lg: Granddaddy Purple is a celebrated strain known for its deep purple buds dusted with white resin and fiery orange hairs. It delivers a potent blend of cerebral euphoria and physical relaxation, often leaving users in a dreamy state while fixed in place. Its complex grape and berry aroma and flavour, combined with a soothing effect, make it ideal for managing chronic pain, muscle spasms, insomnia, and stress. A favourite among growers for its hefty yields and relatively quick flowering time, Granddaddy Purple is a revered classic with enduring popularity.

name: Ice Cream Cake
description_sm: Creamy and sweet with relaxing and sedating effects for evening use.
description_md: Ice Cream Cake offers a sedating, relaxing high with creamy, sweet vanilla flavours, ideal for unwinding at night and easing pain, sleep troubles, and anxiety.
description_lg: Ice Cream Cake is a rare hybrid strain famed for its rich creamy flavour enhanced by sweet vanilla and sugary dough notes. The high begins with cerebral uplift and happiness before gently cascading into deep physical relaxation and sedation. Its small, dense, forest green nugs coated with frosty trichomes hint at the luxurious experience within. Perfect for evening use, Ice Cream Cake soothes chronic pain, insomnia, and anxiety, making it a popular choice for those seeking calm and restfulness after a long day.

name: Sour Diesel
description_sm: Energising, uplifting, and bright with a pungent diesel aroma.
description_md: Sour Diesel delivers a fast-acting, cerebral high that stimulates creativity and energy, with a pungent diesel and citrus aroma perfect for daytime use.
description_lg: Sour Diesel is a legendary strain recognised for its invigorating cerebral effects that spark creativity and uplift the mood without causing couch lock. Its distinctive pungent aroma reminiscent of diesel fuel with citrus notes complements dense light green buds adorned with orange hairs. First popularised in the early 1990s, Sour Diesel remains a favourite for alleviating anxiety, depression, chronic pain, and fatigue, making it ideal for those seeking an energising yet balanced experience to start their day.

name: Runtz
description_sm: Fruity and tropical flavours complement uplifting, relaxing, and calming effects.
description_md: Runtz offers a creamy and smooth smoke paired with a euphoric, uplifting high that spreads from a calming head lift to deep physical relaxation, perfect for stress and pain relief.
description_lg: Runtz is renowned for its fruity flavour resembling sugary candy, featuring dense grape-shaped nugs with purple undertones. It delivers a euphoric and long-lasting high starting with a calming cerebral lift, then spreading deep physical relaxation that often results in couch-lock and peaceful sleep. Awarded Leafly Strain of the Year 2020, it provides effects ideal for tackling anxiety, insomnia, chronic pain, and stress.

name: Gelato
description_sm: Sweet, fruity and creamy flavours with relaxing, euphoric and uplifting effects.
description_md: Gelato delivers a swiftly arriving euphoric head rush followed by a gentle body buzz that calms and relaxes without sedation, ideal for relieving muscle spasms, chronic pain, and fatigue.
description_lg: Gelato is celebrated for its luscious sweet sherbet taste with notes of blueberry and citrus, complemented by a fragrant lavender and woody aroma. The buds burn with a powerful but well-balanced high beginning with an immediate cerebral uplift and joyous euphoria, then progressing into a calming body relaxation that avoids couch-lock. Its vibrant dense nugs, adorned with rich purple and orange hairs, make it a favourite for managing pain, insomnia, inflammation, and stress, offering both mental stimulation and physical ease.

name: Cereal Milk
description_sm: Sweet creamy and fruity flavours with calming, creative, and uplifting effects.
description_md: Cereal Milk’s sweet, creamy flavour with hints of berries pairs with a euphoric lift that inspires creativity, sociability, and long-lasting calm ideal for relaxing days.
description_lg: Cereal Milk combines a genuinely unique sweet milk and ice cream flavour reminiscent of cereal milk, accompanied by fruity berry undertones and a subtle herbal aroma. Its slow-building high begins with a euphoric mental lift that fosters happiness, creativity, and sociability. This is followed by a calm, focused state that endures for hours, making it an excellent companion for relaxed weekends or mindful socialising. The buds are dense and heart-shaped with a frosty coating, making it as appealing visually as it is in effect.
